message: No action needed: Commit 2c1828c (PR #58283, by @ArcturusZhang) modifies only `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Providers/MockableArmClientProvider.cs`. This is a single-file internal generator bug fix that threads extra collection constructor parameters through ArmClient extension methods. There are no new emitter options, no new public API surface, no user-facing README changes required, and no documentation gaps identified.
